name: Contentful
description: Contentful Content Delivery API provides read-only access to content in a Contentful space. Retrieve entries, assets, content types, locales, tags, and taxonomy concepts. Supports full-text search, filtering, linked content resolution, and incremental synchronization.

capabilities.name: spaces_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata about a Contentful space.

capabilities.name: content_types_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all content types (content model) for a space environment.

capabilities.name: content_types_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single content type definition by ID.

capabilities.name: entries_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve content entries with filtering, search, and linked content resolution.

capabilities.name: entries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single content entry by its ID.

capabilities.name: assets_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve media assets with filtering by MIME type and pagination.

capabilities.name: assets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single asset by ID with file URL and metadata.

capabilities.name: asset_keys_create
capabilities.description: Create an asset key for signing embargoed asset URLs.

capabilities.name: locales_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all configured locales for a space environment.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all public tags in a space environment.

capabilities.name: tags_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single tag by its ID.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_concepts_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all taxonomy concepts in a space environment.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_concept_schemes_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all taxonomy concept schemes (controlled vocabularies).

capabilities.name: sync_initial
capabilities.description: Perform initial or incremental content synchronization with cursor support.
